info.title: BE Summit API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for the BE Summit project

get.summary: Get details of a specific basecamp (Admin)

deskripsi.example: Gunung berapi aktif di Jawa Barat.

post.summary: Update an existing mountain profile (Admin) [Uses POST with _method=PUT]

deskripsi.example: Gunung berapi di Jawa Barat dengan pemandangan indah.

foto.description: Optional new mountain picture file (JPEG/PNG, max 2MB)

post.summary: Create a new trail for a mountain (Admin)

deskripsi.example: Jalur pendakian yang berbatu dan terdapat air panas.

get.summary: Get details of a specific KYC profile (Admin)
Download climber uploaded identity document file securely (Admin)

404.description: KYC profile or document file not found

post.summary: Verify (approve or reject) a climber KYC profile (Admin)

alasan_penolakan.example: Foto KTP buram dan tidak terbaca.

post.summary: Create a new partner (mitra) profile and user account (Admin)

message.example: Partner profile and user account created successfully.

get.summary: Get details of a specific partner (mitra) profile (Admin)

delete.summary: Delete a partner profile and user account (Admin)

message.example: Partner profile and user account deleted successfully.

get.summary: List all products across all basecamps (Admin)
Get details of any specific product (Admin)

201.description: User registered successfully, verification OTP sent

message.example: Registration successful. Please check your email for the OTP verification code.

post.summary: Verify email registration using OTP code

200.description: Email verified successfully, access token returned

post.summary: Resend OTP verification code to user email

message.example: A new OTP verification code has been sent to your email.

get.summary: List all products owned by this partner (Mitra)

post.summary: Create a new product with opentrip/ticket details (Mitra)

get.summary: Get details of a specific product (Mitra)

deskripsi.example: Tenda double layer kapasitas 4 orang teruji air hujan

get.summary: List all mountains with their trails (Climber)
Get details of a specific mountain and its trails (Climber)

post.summary: Submit KYC climber profile identity details and upload identity photo

get.summary: Get climber current KYC status and profile

post.summary: Create a new climber booking order (Pesanan)

422.description: Validation error / Out of stock or quota

get.summary: List all active products for climbers (Pendaki)
Get details of an active product for climbers (Pendaki)

produks.description: List of products sold by this basecamp

deskripsi.example: Gunung api aktif di Jawa Barat yang populer.

jalurs.description: List of trails associated with this mountain

deskripsi.example: Jalur legendaris berbatu dengan pemandangan air panas.
Tenda dome double layer kapasitas 4 orang.
